name: rabbit-spec
summary: Owner of the rabbit workflow's spec-lifecycle surface. Hosts the rabbit-spec-creator subagent (drafts AND writes a new feature's initial docs/spec.md, returning a {path_written, summary} handoff) with its input assembler scripts/dispatch-spec-creator.py, and the rabbit-spec-update skill (revises existing specs; absorbed from rabbit-feature/rabbit-feature-spec).
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes native spec-lifecycle skills that supersede this feature
spec_no_change_reason: Spec amended this cycle (bumped 1.17.0 -> 1.18.0, bug #1043): Inv 4 now requires rabbit-spec-update's SKILL.md mode detection to dual-accept the vendored-marker value `vendored` (canonical) alongside the legacy `plugin` for the vendored feature_root branch, mirroring the _VENDORED_MODES = ("vendored", "plugin") coexistence idiom; previously it pinned `plugin` exactly, so a `vendored` marker fell through to the standalone path. Added enforcing test test-rabbit-spec-update-vendored-mode.py. Numbering stays contiguous 1..8.
